Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents; For An Order That The Gehuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Specified In Pltff'S Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Sanction
Off Calendar Jun-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Cohen, Esq., 800.492.2657. for plaintiff; No other appearances.

RULING: Argued and the Court granted PLAINTIFF RESURGENCE CAPITAL, LLC's Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents; For An Order That The Gehuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Specified In Plaintiff'S Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Sanctions. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported.
